_what: The user-facing capability inventory. Every entry names a control that must be reachable in the DEFAULT (site) look. site:'quick' = its data-cap marker must render inside SiteQuickRow's branch for that chapter. site:'more' = it may live behind the More panel (the classic component named in 'classic'), but that chapter's quick row must then carry a cap-more-<chapter> signpost or an onMore control. Removing a control without editing this file is a test failure — that is the point. Checker: tools/capability_test.mjs (static reachability; it cannot catch CSS hiding or occlusion — that is the live elementFromPoint audit's job).
